subject: Mozi Minute: Risk Reversal Gold
body:
Words I like: Opportunity only looks like opportunity looking backwards.

Most people think risk reversal means just offering a guarantee.

But there's a deeper level.

Think like an insurance model.

Recruiters: "We replace any bad hire for free for the first 90 days."

Agencies: "We extend your campaign for free until you hit ROI."

Therapists: "We offer a free session to see if we're a good fit."

Software: "You don't pay until implementation is complete."

The pattern: Make it so the customer has ZERO downside risk, and YOU take the risk.

People will pay more and longer to avoid pain than they will for pleasure.

Use this.
